goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'european' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve european food
Make sure you get postcode and address
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
Make sure you get address and postcode
